mission.title: alertmanager: AlertManager is ignoring Discord's Message Limits
mission.description: AlertManager is ignoring Discord's Message Limits. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current alertmanager deployment
steps.description:
Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
helm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working alertmanager installation.

steps.title: Review alertmanager configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager
```
**What did you do?**

Set up alertmanager with the prometheus-operator, setup the kube-prometheus library of metrics and alerts, configured some routes and a few discord and slack receivers.

steps.title: Apply the fix for AlertManager is ignoring Discord's Message Limits
steps.description:
Discord is limiting the length of the message (title, description). In this PR, I propose truncating the strings like AM does for pushover or opsgenie.

Doc: https://discord.com/developers/docs/resources/channel#embed-object-embed-limits
```yaml
ts=2023-03-30T12:32:21.595Z caller=dispatch.go:352 level=error component=dispatcher msg="Notify for alerts failed" num_alerts=20 err="elder-discord-minor/discord[0]: notify retry canceled due to unrecoverable error after 1 attempts: unexpected status code 400: {\"embeds\": [\"0\"]}"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager
kubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "AlertManager is ignoring Discord's Message Limits" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Discord is limiting the length of the message (title, description). In this PR, I propose truncating the strings like AM does for pushover or opsgenie.

Doc: https://discord.com/developers/docs/resources/channel#embed-object-embed-limits
codeSnippets: ts=2023-03-30T12:32:21.595Z caller=dispatch.go:352 level=error component=dispatcher msg="Notify for alerts failed" num_alerts=20 err="elder-discord-minor/discord[0]: notify retry canceled due to unrecoverable error after 1 attempts: unexpected status code 400: {\"embeds\": [\"0\"]}"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with alertmanager installed or the issue environment reproducible.
